'''vakaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallcraft|smallcraft]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallcraft|smallcraft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vakaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækæjæth|vækæjæth]] || [[word:vækæjæj|vækæjæj]] || [[word:vækæjæsh|vækæjæsh]] || [[word:vækæjæ|vækæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakakajath|vakakajath]] || [[word:vakakajaj|vakakajaj]] || [[word:vakakajash|vakakajash]] || [[word:vakakaja|vakakaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakajath|vakajath]] || [[word:vakajaj|vakajaj]] || [[word:vakajash|vakajash]] || [[word:vakaja|vakaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakafjath|vakafjath]] || [[word:vakafjaj|vakafjaj]] || [[word:vakafjash|vakafjash]] || [[word:vakafjaf|vakafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakajatha|vakajatha]] || [[word:vakajaja|vakajaja]] || [[word:vakajasha|vakajasha]] || [[word:vakajaka|vakajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakajath|vakajath]] || [[word:vakajaj|vakajaj]] || [[word:vakajash|vakajash]] || [[word:vakaja|vakaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakajathal|vakajathal]] || [[word:vakajajal|vakajajal]] || [[word:vakajashal|vakajashal]] || [[word:vakajakal|vakajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakajathatha|vakajathatha]] || [[word:vakajajaja|vakajajaja]] || [[word:vakajashasha|vakajashasha]] || [[word:vakajaka|vakajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakajathan|vakajathan]] || [[word:vakajajan|vakajajan]] || [[word:vakajashan|vakajashan]] || [[word:vakajakan|vakajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakajathaoro|vakajathaoro]] || [[word:vakajajaoro|vakajajaoro]] || [[word:vakajashaoro|vakajashaoro]] || [[word:vakajakaoro|vakajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
